action.reasoning: Observation: iter 13 trained a head on frozen features achieving val_macro_f1=0.160151, saved best_head.pt. Remaining time only 0.67h, 17 iterations left. Analysis: Submitting best_head.pt may yield higher test macro_f1 than the 0.0799 from full fine-tuning. However, predict.py currently uses a linear classifier; head training might have used an MLP, causing mismatch and wrong predictions. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to auto-detect classifier architecture from the checkpoint (handles linear or multi-layer MLP), load vision encoder from pretrained, and load weights with strict alignment. Submit eval immediately with best_head.pt to get final score before time runs out.
